body.title: Utility closet as THE web server: kill 8081 + claude_bridge, wire Igor through uc_client
body.result: UC (8080) is now the only web server. Igor's web/server.py gutted to a 150-line facade preserving legacy API. Background poll thread drains UC → incoming queue. main.py launches UC if not running. claude_bridge.py deleted (415 lines). Igor launcher path fixed. 1947 tests pass. Net: -1829 lines. Follow-up: MCP tool rename (T-mcp-channel-rename).
body.description: Utility closet (8080) becomes the only web server. (1) Move Igor's channel-tabs UI from wild_igor/igor/web/ to lab/claudecode/utility_closet_server.py UI if not already there. (2) Ensure UC has named channel support matching current Igor 8081 behavior (SHARED, IGOR, CLAUDE, per-agent as they attach). (3) Wire Igor's outbound exclusively through utility_closet_client.py (currently a fallback path per D335 — make it the only path). (4) Delete wild_igor/igor/web/server.py HTTP/WS code (keep internal message queue if needed). (5) Delete lab/claudecode/claude_bridge.py entirely. (6) Update MCP tools: rename cc_send→channel_send with channel param, point at 8080. (7) Verify dashboard/metrics/upload endpoints still work on 8080. Igor brings up UC on boot if not running (PID file already atomic).
